title: trifolium litorale
intro: Trifolium litorale, also known as salt clover or coastal clover, is a perennial legume native to Europe and North Africa. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues and its antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Trifolium litorale include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antioxidant. Trifolium litorale can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues and promote overall well-being.
